gap_report.details: Tone code A: No printed legend; single shade 03A Terra Cotta (warm name) contradicts conventional 'A = Ash'; unresolved
gap_report.recommended_next_action: Retrieve a newer official chart or education material that prints the tone legend for this code.

gap_report.details: Tone code AA: No printed legend; shade names (Papaya, Bonfire) suggest warm/copper but contradict conventional 'AA = intense ash' reading; unresolved
gap_report.recommended_next_action: Retrieve a newer official chart or education material that prints the tone legend for this code.

gap_report.details: Tone code GI: No printed legend; shade names (Tahitian Sand, Hamptons, St. Barths, Tenerife) do not unambiguously identify a tone family
gap_report.recommended_next_action: Retrieve a newer official chart or education material that prints the tone legend for this code.

gap_report.details: 139 shades extracted in Batch 3. Full digit/combo tone legend lives in pro-gated Product Knowledge Guide PDF; combo-code mappings partially inferred from public product pages.
gap_report.recommended_next_action: Retrieve pro-gated Product Knowledge Guide or official mixing-ratio PDF to confirm inferred tone codes.

gap_report.details: 29 shades extracted in Batch 4 from 6 sub-collections; official line claims 44+ shades — remaining shades not on crawled collection pages.
gap_report.recommended_next_action: Crawl remaining sub-collections or official shade chart when cataloged.

risk_report.details: Shade names, charts, swatch books, and education PDFs are manufacturer-copyrighted marketing/technical works. Storing extracted facts (codes, levels, ratios) is generally factual data, but republishing chart layouts, swatch imagery, or large verbatim text excerpts could infringe; several artifacts quote legend wording verbatim.
risk_report.affected_scope: All shade and legend records; any future UI that displays manufacturer assets.
risk_report.mitigation: Keep verbatim quotes limited to short attributions; never redistribute PDFs/swatch images; show provenance links instead. Obtain legal review before commercial redistribution; consider manufacturer/distributor data partnerships.

risk_report.details: SalonCentric and wellastore actively bot-block (403/timeouts observed); scraping gated pro portals may violate their ToS. All Batch 1-2 data came from publicly served pages/PDFs.
risk_report.mitigation: Prefer official public PDFs; request API/feed access from distributors; respect robots and rate limits.

risk_report.details: Newest parseable official charts vary widely: Redken 2020-2022, Matrix 2023, L'Oréal 2025, SKP 2021-2022. Shades launched after a chart's revision date are absent (e.g., IGORA ROYAL 133 extracted vs 143 claimed).
risk_report.affected_scope: All normalized shade records; formula generation accuracy.
risk_report.mitigation: Track per-source revision dates (already stored); schedule re-crawl; reconcile against manufacturer 'NEW' announcements.

risk_report.details: ~15% of tone mappings are inferred (flagged) rather than legend-confirmed; 8 codes remain fully unresolved (e.g., Redken SEQ GI, AA, A). Cross-line letter reuse (SEQ borrowing CGL legend) is explicitly inferred.
risk_report.affected_scope: Multi-brand tone mapping and formula conversion quality.
risk_report.mitigation: Treat ambiguity_flag/mapping_confidence as first-class inputs to conversion logic; queue unresolved codes for education-material retrieval.

risk_report.details: Several lines verified only on non-US official sites (Paul Mitchell via TH/DE sites, Wella Magma global, L'Oréal Colorful Hair NL); US shade availability can differ from global charts (Wella store tiles unreadable).
risk_report.mitigation: Keep region in the canonical key (already in schema); extract per-market charts before serving market-specific output.

risk_report.details: Active rebrands/transitions observed: Rusk Designer Collection relaunch (2026), Dia Richesse -> Dia Color, PM Shines -> The Demi, possible Matrix Super Sync addition, #mydentity Vibrant/Pastel -> Super Power.
risk_report.affected_scope: Brand/line naming stability; conversion charts between old and new lines.
risk_report.mitigation: Model successor relationships between lines; ingest official conversion charts (Dia Richesse->Dia Color chart exists on the US site).

risk_report.details: Batches 1-2 cover 10 lines from 5 large brands (all L'Oréal/Henkel/Wella-affiliated except none independent); 14 of 20 seed brands have inventory + sources but no shade-level data yet.
risk_report.mitigation: Prioritize next batches: Goldwell (Topchic/Colorance), Joico (LumiShine), Pravana (ChromaSilk), Paul Mitchell (The Demi), plus independents (Danger Jones Epilogue is 2026-new with a live official site).
